benefits.title: VA Health Care Enrollment
benefits.description: Comprehensive medical, mental health, and preventive care through the VA health system.
benefits.likely_if: honorable discharge AND (combat deployment OR disability rating OR income below threshold)
benefits.link_text: Learn about VA health care eligibility on VA.gov (opens in new tab)
vso_questions: Whether your service record meets VA health care enrollment criteria.
Which priority group may apply to you.
What records to bring if you are not already enrolled.
benefits.next_step: Bring your DD-214 and any VA or private medical records to a VSO or VA enrollment office.

benefits.title: VA Disability Compensation
benefits.description: Monthly tax-free payment for veterans with service-connected physical or mental conditions.
benefits.likely_if: service-connected disability AND not yet receiving compensation
benefits.link_text: Learn about disability compensation on VA.gov (opens in new tab)
vso_questions: Whether each condition can be connected to your service.
Which evidence best supports the claim.
Whether to file a new claim or a supplemental claim.
benefits.next_step: Gather medical records, service records, and any buddy statements before starting VA Form 21-526EZ.

benefits.title: PTSD / Mental Health Benefits
benefits.description: Additional disability compensation and treatment for mental health conditions related to military service.
benefits.likely_if: combat deployment OR PTSD listed as a disability condition
benefits.link_text: Learn about PTSD disability claims on VA.gov (opens in new tab)
vso_questions: Whether the combat presumption or another stressor rule applies.
What evidence can support the mental health claim.
Whether VA Form 21-0781 is needed with the claim.
benefits.next_step: Write down dates, locations, units, and treatment history before meeting with your VSO.

benefits.title: GI Bill Education Benefits (Post-9/11)
benefits.description: Tuition, housing, and book stipends for qualifying education programs for veterans who served after Sept. 10, 2001.
benefits.likely_if: service began after September 10, 2001 with honorable discharge
benefits.link_text: Learn about Post-9/11 GI Bill benefits on VA.gov (opens in new tab)
vso_questions: Which education benefit chapter fits your service.
Whether your program is approved for VA education benefits.
benefits.next_step: Bring service dates and any prior VA education benefit records before applying.

benefits.title: VA Home Loan Guarantee
benefits.description: Helps veterans purchase, build, or refinance a home with favorable terms and no private mortgage insurance.
benefits.likely_if: honorable discharge with sufficient service length
benefits.link_text: Learn about VA-backed home loans on VA.gov (opens in new tab)
vso_questions: Whether your service period meets Certificate of Eligibility rules.
What home loan entitlement may be available.
Which lender or property details you need before applying.
benefits.next_step: Ask about a Certificate of Eligibility or what records a VA-approved lender will need.
